testsuite.name: Provider registration in ReserveHub

testcase.name: Register a provider successfully using an admin-generated code

testsuite.system-out: Scenario Outline: Register a provider successfully using an admin-generated code ?[90m# src/test/resources/features/providerregister.feature:13?[0m ?[32mGiven ?[0m?[32mthe admin provider code for registration?[0m ?[90m# co.com.udea.reservehub.reservehub.stepdefinitions.ProviderRegisterStepDefinition.the_admin_generates_a_provider_code_for_registration()?[0m ?[32mAnd ?[0m?[32m?[1m"Secure@123"?[0m?[32m, phone ?[0m?[32m?[1m"3001234567"?[0m?[32m, service type ?[0m?[32m?[1m"SALON"?[0m?[32m and service description ?[0m?[32m?[1m"Servicio de salon de fiestas"?[0m ?[90m#
